text:
There was a small old bookstore. People came from far and wide. There was nothing interesting there. That was until one day. There was dust. Dust settled around the ancient brass clock.

The girls would stop by and say hello. They were lovely. They looked nice. They read. Often they wanted stories. Rare stories that belonged only to little cities.

They were bored. They thought maybe there was something interesting. Something beautiful.

They looked harder and found...

Some old man wanted them gone. They were talking a big threat. So afraid. But no. They did leave.

One girl took the clock. Wrapped it snug. Took it to school.

She showed people. They thought it wonderful. Old things were interesting. They wanted history.

She showed them. They wanted stories.

There wasn't anything nice just sitting on its axis. Nothing interesting about old stuff...Until...

She took it downstairs. On a beam. She saw sunlight. It painted things nice.

She hung it.

It
